warnings: This sheet (A-17) is dedicated entirely to WC.3 (2nd-floor bathroom) -- see the upper floor plan (หน้า07, element 'ห้องน้ำ3') which showed a matching '3 +3.65 2' box and 'ห้องน้ำ 3 ดูแบบขยาย WC3 A-17' callout.
One of 2 views on this page; sibling is the section view _view2_wc3_section.json.

Unlike WC.2 (หน้า18), this room is NOT split into two separately-leveled zones (อาบน้ำ vs ห้องน้ำ) -- WC.3 has a single floor level (+3.65) throughout, with the shower fixture (visible in the section view) integrated into the same open room rather than a distinct sub-zone.
This is the last of the 3 dedicated bathroom sheets (A-15=WC.1, A-16=WC.2, A-17=WC.3 per this house's index).
